title: Ice Slushy Maker Game
description: Do you love Frosty Ice Drinks, Frozen Slushy Maker, and Frozen Snow Cones? Do you love Rainbow Food Maker Cooking Games? Then you will LOVE Rainbow Candy Frozen Slushy Truck - Ice Candy Slush Maker! The Frozen Slushy Truck has arrived! Mix & Create your Favorite Ice Slushy Drink using the most colorful Ingredients ever! Select from a variety of Rainbow Flavors, and start dicing up the fruit! Mix & blend, and pour into your Frozen Rainbow Slushy Machine! Pour your creation into the cup and start decorating! Mix in a Variety of Rainbow Candy, Gummy Bears, Candy Fruit, Gummy Worms, and more! Put your fancy straw in and slurp your Slushy up until your cup is empty! Refill your drink, and slurp your Frozen Rainbow Slushy again! Rainbow Candy Frozen Slushy Maker is great fun Families who enjoy Colorful Rainbow Food Maker Games!
instructions: Do you love Frosty Ice Drinks Frozen Slushy Maker and Frozen Snow Cones Do you love Rainbow Food Maker Cooking Games Then you will LOVE Rainbow Candy Frozen Slushy Truck - Ice Candy Slush Maker The Frozen Slushy Truck has arrived
